---
title: 'Free Market Capitalism, Social Justice, and Governments Role'
date: '2012-12-03T04:18:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe for Office'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '576096075984258781'
blogger_filename: '/2012/12/parties-platforms-and-origins.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe for Office/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Platform'
---

<h3>
God is a God of Freedom and Compassion, and it takes both to keep the peace for any group of people.</h3>
<br />
<h4>
Freedom and Compassion are the bedrock of a free society.&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
Freedom without Compassion can leave an old widow dying hungry in her home. Compassion without Freedom will stifle creativity and the motivation to produce, which will leave everyone dying hungry in their home.<br />
<br />
The United States of America (USA) was founded on July 4, 1776. Throughout the past 240+ years of the Freedom Experiment (USA), we have had our failures and successes. We have leaned too far to one side of the other. But many great ideas, organizations, and thinkers have contributed to the balance of Freedom and Compassion.<br />
<br />
Let's explore these topics a little further.<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
<h4 style="text-align: left;">
Freedom: Free Market Capitalism</h4>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Free Market Capitalism, without any restraints, is men with power taking more and more from people without power.</blockquote>
Without any referees, the powerful can eat up the weak, and we end up with a monopoly. There can be bullies on the playground.The one who has the better hand wins.<br />
<br />
They are at a race to the bottom line dollar. There is often no market benefit, to treat the employees well, more will take their place.<br />
<br />
When they do give benefits to their staff, it's not because it's right or good, they give them to steal employees away from their competitors.<br />
<br />
Men are rewarded for their hard work, but not for their gifts to others. So they take and steal and push and shove.<br />
<br />
It is a system where Shark eats Shark. Men kill to get ahead. This can be seen most acutely by people climbing the corporate ladder or dealing with Wall Street. It's a system where the best player wins and everyone else looses.<br />
<br />
It's a zero sum game. I must win and you must loose. Both of us can't win.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Socialism</h4>
Socialism, in any form without God, is evil. It takes away, more and more, from the Rich, who generally got their money through hard work, and gives it to the poor, who generally don't seek to acheive greatness in their life. The clearest example of Socialism that many every day persons can see is the Modern Day Unions. Just this year, Unions single handidly killed the all mighty Twinkie. It was lazy and worthless and whiney unions that destroyed the company that brought America the Twinkie. Due to their behavior they lost the very jobs they were whining about. You can't have what you speak against. So 100,000+ people are now out of work because of unions. And this is only the begining. Any company saturated with Unions will grow sicker until it too either purges itself of them or dies. President Obama cheers himself for "saving" Chevy. He did not. He nailed the coffin. Eventually Chevy, too, will either purge as it should have before now, or die and become a company that once was. "Do you remember Chevy?" I think so, wasn't that the company that produces cars until...?"<br />
<br />
I worked for the evil Teamsters Unions for 3 years. The result? Policies that feed powerful union leaders and take away from the very people they serve. Letters asking you to vote for ungodly men because union leaders sold their soul to those devils. Two men applying for a job and the one who is better fit is turned down in order to promote the lazy man who has been there longer. Tenure, not Skill or Character, determine the leadership within. Since hard work and strong moral character are neither appreciated or rewarded good men either become more lazy, since it doesn't matter how hard they work, or leave to find a company that better apreciates them. It's a system that engages the law of diminishing returns. The more you give the workers the less they do for you. Then you become like other European nations, asking to have more days off than they work and retire with full pay at 50 without having put anything in. Men don't take responsibility for themselves or their counterparts. The longer this system goes the less it produces until eventually the Corporation or Country that embraces it collapses in on itself. It's a selfish system of give me give me give me.<br />
<br />
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
God's System</h4>
<div>
There are two versions of God's system that are worth discussing. But one has more bearing in the here and now. Ultimately Jesus will return to earth and set up a physical reign over planet earth. There will be no Kingdom or system of Government other than His. It will reign for a 1,000 years before the planet is destroyed and re-created. That day is much closer than most realize, but it hasn't come yet. While we wait God set up a whole book about his dealings with one nation, Israel. It was God, not men, that established that nation. Jesus came and showed us that many things we see in the "Old Testament" or "Torah" were in fact shadows of things to come. We need not set up the USA with national temples of worship and animal sacrifices. However God left us with timeless principles in His Word regarding how a nation ought to be run. Murder is treated differently depending on how it was done. There are laws regarding debt, that derive our Bankruptcy laws directly from.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
The bottom line is that BOTH Socialism and&nbsp;Capitalism&nbsp;are dreivitaves of and from God's national plan. Both are&nbsp;hijacked forms of government that distort and twist the original plan, but have their origin in that plan. God rewards hard work and character and moral compass. He wants people to work hard for themselves and contribute to society. Any system that fails to reward the hard working individual and help them to because self sustaining and contributing members to society is a failed system. But God's system has compassion on the Orphans, Widows, and Strangers of the land. It has laws to protect, guide, feed, and care for these. Jesus assures us that we will ALWAYS have poor among us. But how we treat them must be filled with compassion.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Over the years the Democratic Party has embraced Socliasm. As such certain Christian groups embraced them, seeing this has having a heart for the little guy. Despite the fact that the party continues to move away from God's Word, God's Name, they still hold fast to them. Despite the Party of Democrats actively seeking to promote UnGodly lifestyles and Murder Innocent children, Christian follow these people out of some misguided desire to protect the little guy.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Over the years the Republican Party has embraced&nbsp;Capitalism. As such it too has sought bigger and more&nbsp;government. It has sold out it's people to the needs of the wealthiest contributors and walked away from God's principles in many cases. They serve God with their lips, but their hearts are far from Him. This is evidenced as both parties leadership seeks to undermine Israel at every chance they get.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
It has come time for a new party. Of the people, by the people, for the people Of God. This IS a Christian Nation. Not was. It was founded by and for Christians. Only the Judeo-Christian ethic should hold dominant view here in this land. When, and only when, God's people rise and become ONE VOICE will this nation be restored. We either take back one or both parties unilaterally, or we stand united in a new party with a new voice. If EVERY Christian voted the same way, we would not be in this mess today. We are many, and powerful, and just as Israel was called to rid the land of enemies, so must we rid this land of the ideas and idealogies of evil. Individual people can stay or go as they please... but we must rule the public sector.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
to be continued... Darrell</div>
